evidences.title: NVIDIA Stock Split: Full Breakdown, History, and Investor ...
evidences.content: #### Short-Term Stock Performance Historically, stock splits tend to generate positive short-term momentum as investor excitement drives increased trading activity. Following NVIDIA's announcement of its 10-for-1 split on June 7, 2024, the stock price experienced an immediate uptick, rising approximately 5% within the first two days of trading. Post-split, the adjusted share price of $120 led to increased buying activity among retail investors, who saw the lower price as a more accessible entry point. Trading volumes also surged as both new and existing investors capitalized on the split-adjusted shares. [...] 2. June 2024: Most recently, NVIDIA announced a 10-for-1 stock split in response to its stock price surpassing $1,000 per share. This split was NVIDIA’s largest to date and underscored its position as a leader in the AI chip market. The move came on the heels of record-breaking earnings, driven by soaring demand for NVIDIA's GPUs, particularly in AI model training and cloud infrastructure. By reducing the share price, NVIDIA aimed to make its stock more accessible to retail investors, enhancing liquidity and expanding its investor base. [...] ## Introduction to NVIDIA's 20...

evidences.title: Nvidia stock rises after 10-for-1 stock split - Yahoo Finance
evidences.content: ### New on Yahoo [...] ### [...] The split means that owners of Nvidia common stock held as of the close of market on Thursday received 10 shares for each one share they held. For example, if a shareholder owned four shares of Nvidia as of Thursday, they now own 40 shares post-split. Stock splits make owning shares of a stock more affordable by lowering the price of individual shares without diluting the value of existing shareholders' total holdings. "The stock split is going to make Nvidia a lot more reachable for a lot of these retail traders," Option Research & Technology Services' Matt Amberson told Yahoo Finance last Thursday. "Now, you rarely see a stock over $1,000 with a 50% implied volatility, so the prices of the options are extraordinarily high, so options traders are really looking forward to the split."

evidences.title: NVDA Stock Splits - NVIDIA Corp
evidences.content: ## NVDA's latest stock split occurred on Jun 10, 2024 The company executed a 10-for-1 stock split, meaning that for every share held, investors received 10 new shares. Before the split, NVDA traded at 1208.88 per share. Afterward, the share price was about 121.7347. The adjusted shares began trading on Jun 10, 2024. This was NVDA's 7th stock split, following the previous one in Jul 20, 2021. evidences.title: If You Bought 1 Share of Nvidia at Its IPO, Here's How Many Shares ...
evidences.content: What do you get when you put Wall Street's two hottest trends -- artificial intelligence (AI) and stock splits -- together? The stock market's largest public company, Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA). A stock split is a tool public companies have available to adjust their share price and outstanding share count by the same factor. These adjustments can be used to increase the share price (in a reverse split) or to make shares more nominally affordable (in a forward split). AI titan Nvidia is no stranger to making its high-flying stock more affordable for everyday investors. ## Unpacking Nvidia's stock-split history Nvidia's initial public offering (IPO) took place on Jan. 12, 1999, at $12 per share. Over the last 26-plus years, Wall Street's AI giant has completed six stock splits:
